name: skillissue
description: Jack Arturo's personal/agent skills collection — skills that earn their keep across Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and AutoHub.

skills.name: jacks-writing-style
skills.description: Write exactly like Jack Arturo — direct, casual, technical, with personality. For blog posts, READMEs, CHANGELOGs, technical audits, and system prompts.

skills.name: find-skills
skills.description: Discover and install agent skills when you ask “how do I do X” or “is there a skill for…”. Routes through the open skills ecosystem and Skills CLI.

skills.name: cloudflare-ops
skills.description: Deploy AutoHub-style projects to Cloudflare — Pages preflights, D1 migrations/sync, tunnel helpers, preview pairs, and DNS ops without pasting tokens into chat.

skills.name: dev-browser
skills.description: Drive the user's real Chrome end-to-end — open, snapshot, fill, click, screenshot, autofill — via extension relay or headless connect, reusing live login state.

skills.name: skill-author
skills.description: Package and validate an existing skill draft for AutoVault — frontmatter, resources, capabilities, and admission checks before it enters the vault.

skills.name: commit-message
skills.description: Draft a conventional-commit-style message from the repository's staged changes. Git only — no external services or API keys.

skills.name: babysit
skills.description: Create or take over a PR, require Codex review, address P0/P1 threads, fix scoped CI failures, and leave the PR merge-ready without merging.

skills.name: inbox-triage
skills.description: Triage Gmail unread into action buckets (!Action / !AI Handle / !Waiting On / archive) and post one digest.

skills.name: cli-installer-ux
skills.description: Design and harden compact CLI installers, updaters, and setup wizards without leaking debug logs or machine JSON into human UX.

skills.name: mcp-builder
skills.description: Guide for creating high-quality MCP servers that enable LLMs to interact with external services through well-designed tools.

skills.name: session-consolidate
skills.description: Harvest durable learnings into AutoMem and create/update/merge AutoVault skills at a natural stopping point, with confirmation before destructive skill changes.

skills.name: docs-screenshot-packager
skills.description: Capture, package, optimize, verify, and place documentation screenshots for READMEs, repo docs, and marketing sites.

skills.name: cloudflare-lead-capture
skills.description: Scaffold Cloudflare Pages/Workers lead-capture with D1 contacts, Resend templates, Turnstile, unsubscribe, and a small admin UI.

skills.name: awtrix-board
skills.description: Control Ulanzi TC001 LED matrix displays running AWTRIX 3 — notifications, brightness, sensors — device-direct over the LAN.

skills.name: flashspace
skills.description: Operate FlashSpace virtual workspaces on macOS — switch profiles, assign apps, manage floating windows.

skills.name: raycast
skills.description: Operate and partially configure Raycast via deeplinks, Script Commands, and AI provider packs.

skills.name: autojack-delegate
skills.description: Delegate a capability the local session lacks (Calendar, Gmail, Slack, WhatsApp…) to AutoHub's autojack runtime over the local chat API.

skills.name: html-asset-renderer
skills.description: Render fixed-size HTML/CSS design exports into production raster assets — social cards, favicons, docs images, app-store screenshots.
